'''mapomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foeship|foeship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foeship|foeship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mapomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæpemeth|mæpemeth]] || [[word:mæpemej|mæpemej]] || [[word:mæpemesh|mæpemesh]] || [[word:mæpeme|mæpeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapopomoth|mapopomoth]] || [[word:mapopomoj|mapopomoj]] || [[word:mapopomosh|mapopomosh]] || [[word:mapopomo|mapopomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapomoth|mapomoth]] || [[word:mapomoj|mapomoj]] || [[word:mapomosh|mapomosh]] || [[word:mapomo|mapomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapofmoth|mapofmoth]] || [[word:mapofmoj|mapofmoj]] || [[word:mapofmosh|mapofmosh]] || [[word:mapofmof|mapofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mapomotho|mapomotho]] || [[word:mapomojo|mapomojo]] || [[word:mapomosho|mapomosho]] || [[word:mapomoko|mapomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mapomoth|mapomoth]] || [[word:mapomoj|mapomoj]] || [[word:mapomosh|mapomosh]] || [[word:mapomo|mapomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mapomothol|mapomothol]] || [[word:mapomojol|mapomojol]] || [[word:mapomoshol|mapomoshol]] || [[word:mapomokol|mapomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mapomothotho|mapomothotho]] || [[word:mapomojojo|mapomojojo]] || [[word:mapomoshosho|mapomoshosho]] || [[word:mapomoko|mapomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mapomothon|mapomothon]] || [[word:mapomojon|mapomojon]] || [[word:mapomoshon|mapomoshon]] || [[word:mapomokon|mapomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mapomothoro|mapomothoro]] || [[word:mapomojoro|mapomojoro]] || [[word:mapomoshoro|mapomoshoro]] || [[word:mapomokoro|mapomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
